soundscapes.label: Meadow hum
soundscapes.description: A soft hum of bees and small wings the meadow will play one day when the audio bed lands.

soundscapes.label: Pond ripples
soundscapes.description: Quiet water and the small plop of a frog returning to the surface, saved for a future sound layer.

soundscapes.label: Frog chorus
soundscapes.description: A slow chorus of frogs across the pond edge, sketched here in words until ambient sound is added.

soundscapes.label: Birds overhead
soundscapes.description: Calls from the sky zone, planned for a quiet audio layer that will not play on its own.

soundscapes.label: Quiet wind
soundscapes.description: A low background wind that will tie the zones together one day; for now it lives only in this note.
